name: Trey Trung Kroeung (Lemongrass Enrobed Catfish Fillets)
recipeIngredient: 3 Dried Numex Chiles, stems and seeds removed
recipeInstructions:
Note: Asian chiles, such as santaka or japones.
Note: Kaffir limes leaves may be purchased in an Asian market.
Note: Galangal root is available in Asian markets.
1. Soak the New Mexican chiles in water to soften; remove and drain.
2. Place all the paste ingredients in a blender or food processor and puree until smooth.
3. Pan fry the catfish in the oil over high heat until firm, but not browned, turning once.
4. Using a separate pan, cook the paste over medium heat for about 2 minutes, stirring constantly, until the aroma is released.
5. Add the coconut milk, salt, and sugar. Cook until boiling.
6. Add the fish to the sauce and simmer for 5 more minutes.
7. If the paste is too thick, add more water until the desired consistency is achieved.
8. Serve with Jasmine rice and garnish with Kaffir lime leaves.
